modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about fire safety tips and procedures

full_description_text:  
The user asked for fire safety tips. They were concerned about procedures to follow. This was during a live phone call with the help desk. The environment was not specified.

description: The user asked for fire safety tips. They were concerned about procedures to follow. This was during a live phone call with the help desk. The environment was not specified.
